title: Trump Says He Should Have Role in Choosing Iran’s Next Leader
summary_full: The president’s comments were the most detailed he has been about his vision of a U.S. role in creating a new government in Tehran.
summary_public: The president’s comments were the most detailed he has been about his vision of a U.S. role in creating a new government in Tehran.
